risk_if_not_implemented: Without Privileged Access by Non-Organizational Users, unauthorized users may gain access to systems or data, increasing risk of data breaches and insider threats.

compensating_control_1.name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
compensating_control_1.description:
Automated mechanisms exist to enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for:
(1) Remote network access; 
(2) Third-party Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS); and/ or
(3) Non-console access to critical TAAS that store, transmit and/or process sensitive/regulated data.
compensating_control_1.justification: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) (IAC-06) provides access control enforcement that compensates for the absence of Privileged Access by Non-Organizational Users (IAC-05.2) by restricting system and data access to authorized users through alternative identity and access mechanisms. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Third-Party Contract Requirements
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to require contractual requirements for applicable security, compliance and resilience requirements with third-parties, reflecting the organization's needs to protect its Technology Assets, Applications, Services and/or Data (TAASD).
compensating_control_2.justification: Third-Party Contract Requirements (TPM-05) provides third-party oversight that compensates for the absence of Privileged Access by Non-Organizational Users (IAC-05.2) by extending security obligations contractually and monitoring third-party risk in lieu of direct control. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
